# Gobii

> Gobii provides AI agents for recruiting operations.

Gobii helps recruiting teams automate repetitive sourcing, candidate research, shortlist preparation, and workflow handoff across the tools they already use.

Gobii is focused on recruiting operations: paste a job description, then have AI agents research candidates, prepare a shortlist, and generate hiring-manager briefs.

## Core Pages

- [Gobii homepage]({{ base_url }}/): AI agents for recruiting operations.
- [Pricing]({{ base_url }}/pricing/): Self-serve pricing plans, including Pro and Scale.
- [Documentation](https://docs.gobii.ai/): Documentation for Gobii agents and integrations.
- [Full Context]({{ base_url }}/llms-full.txt): More detailed information for LLMs.

## Important Use Cases

- Recruiting operations
- Candidate sourcing
- Candidate profile research
- Shortlist preparation for recruiter review
- Hiring-manager brief generation
- Hiring pipeline exports and workflow handoff

## Integrations

- Google Sheets
- Gmail
- Outlook / Microsoft 365
- Apollo
- Discord
- Hubspot
- Browser-based recruiting systems
- Web browsing
- File uploads
- Remote MCP tools
- Many more - see [Integrations]({{ base_url }}/app/integrations) in your account for details.

## Product Positioning

Gobii is not a generic template directory or chatbot-only interface. It is a focused recruiting operations product that uses AI agents to perform sourcing, candidate research, shortlist preparation, and handoff work.


## Recruiting Operations

- Gobii recruiting agents are persistent digital workers that can search web sources, operate business software, and deliver organized candidate research.
- Gobii recruiting operations workflows can turn a role brief into a source-linked shortlist with fit notes, profile links, work-history context, and hiring-manager briefs.
- Recruiting workflows can export to Google Sheets, CSV, webhooks, and enterprise ATS integrations where configured.
- Gobii is best described as a recruiting operations platform for delegated sourcing, research, shortlist preparation, and workflow handoff, not as a replacement for recruiter judgment or hiring compliance review.
